validator_assessment.weakest_link: Narrow tech-only sector leadership (XLK +1.37% vs XLF +0.19%, XLE +0.29%) without financial or energy confirmation — if XLK momentum stalls, the entire bullish case collapses with no secondary sector support
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: VIX continues rising above 19.5 within first 30 minutes of RTH (medium-high probability) — signals institutional de-risking directly contradicting the macro MID-regime thesis

primary.condition: if SPY breaks and closes a 5m bar above 701.99 on first RTH test
primary.entry_trigger: PMH breakout confirmed by ribbon BULL stack continuation

secondary.condition: if SPY tests 701.99 and is rejected, pulling back toward 700.28
secondary.entry_trigger: level_rejection at PMH with bearish 5m close below 701.00, ribbon still BULL but weakening

invalidation.condition: VIX prints above 19.50 within first 30 minutes of RTH open (by 10:00 ET)
invalidation.effect: Institutional de-risking signal that directly invalidates the macro MID-regime-supports-trend thesis; a rising-VIX open typically means real money is exiting, not entering — full consensus pivot to no_trade required

swarm_predictions.claim: 701.99 premarket high will be tested (SPY price touches 701.90 or above) within the first 60 minutes of RTH, by 10:30 ET
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not reach 701.80 at any point before 10:30 ET, suggesting the premarket high was thin-volume noise that fades on RTH open

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX will remain below 19.50 for the first 30 minutes of RTH (09:30–10:00 ET), consistent with MID-regime and supporting controlled directional follow-through
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX prints above 19.50 at any 5m bar close before 10:00 ET, signaling accelerating uncertainty and invalidating the macro bullish backdrop

swarm_predictions.claim: If SPY closes a 5m bar above 701.99, the immediately following 5m bar will have a green body covering at least 50% of its range, confirming breakout follow-through toward 703.0
swarm_predictions.invalidation: The first 5m bar to close above 701.99 is followed by a red bar that closes back below 701.99 within 10 minutes, confirming a false breakout and gap-fill setup instead

synthesis_narrative: Today's core tension is a technically clean CLEAN_BULL ribbon (80c spread, all 4 specialists unanimously bullish) set against the fragility of narrow tech-only sector leadership and a rising VIX (+4.43% to 18.86) that the validator rates as a medium-high invalidation risk. The unanimous 4/4 bullish vote with a gap-up open (+$0.86) and zero macro events favors an early test of the 701.99 premarket high as the first meaningful RTH move, with a breakout targeting the 703.00 reference level. The single most important thing to watch at open is VIX behavior: a print above 19.50 in the first 30 minutes is the primary kill-switch for the bullish thesis, while XLF confirming risk-on participation (any move above +0.50%) would upgrade conviction meaningfully above current 80 confidence.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BULL ribbon 80c spread, RED-GREEN-GREEN bar momentum, overnight gap up +85c — strong directional conviction

macro.one_line: VIX 18.86 MID-regime rising +4.43% (caution), zero macro events today, tech-led risk-on overnight gap supports measured bullish lean

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 701.99 (PMH) is first resistance; breakout targets 703.0, rejection floor at 699.94 — gap-up BULL ribbon sets bullish default

internals.one_line: XLK +1.37% drives narrow tech-led risk-on rotation; XLF +0.19% and XLE +0.29% flat — breadth insufficient for high-conviction day

validator.top_invalidation: VIX rising 4.43% into open + narrow tech-only breadth (XLF flat) = fragile consensus; premarket high 701.99 is thin-volume noise easily faded by RTH volume
